summary: M397 — Image-review surfaces new class art with prompts + appearance picker shows unlocked portraits first. Backfilled the 28 Enchanter/Priest male+female sprite entries on /assets/image-review-v2.html with prompt context (was empty); the manifest builder now falls back to the art_direction reference-sheet prompt + per-pose style notes when a frame doesn't carry its own prompt yet. Character Builder appearance picker now lists all unlocked portraits before any fame-locked ones while keeping the existing class-grouped order within each band.
